case_title: LILIANA BOUVET VS. EMILY BOGDEN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT BOGDEN, EMILY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,380.00 FILED BY BOUVET, LILIANA AS TO DEFENDANT BOGDEN, EMILY BOGDEN, PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOUVET, LILIANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BOGDEN, EMILY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SIGNED) SERVED JUN-24-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BOGDEN, PAUL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BOGDEN, EMILY
DECLARATION OF LILIANA BOUVET RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOUVET, LILIANA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-30-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAUL BOGDEN IS NO LONGER THE DEFENDANT IN THIS CASE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO PAUL BOGDEN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-31-2013 AT 3:30 PM.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-30-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "PLAINTIFFS CLAIM AGAINST PAUL BOGDEN IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WANTS TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO CLAIM ADDITIONAL EXPENSES. CONTINUED TRIAL", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE ON THE CLAIM IN OPEN COURT AT TODAYS HEARING. PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE THE DEFENDANT WITH THE AMENDED CLAIM, PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-27-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BOGDEN, EMILY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOUVET, LILIANA AS TO DEFENDANT BOGDEN, EMILY
COPYING FEES (20 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BOUVET, LILIANA
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $234.00 FILED BY BOUVET, LILIANA AS TO DEFENDANT BOGDEN, EMILY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOUVET, LILIANA AS TO DEFENDANT BOGDEN, EMILY
BOGDEN, PAUL IS NO LONGER DEFENDANT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
COPYING FEES (16 PAGE, 7 CERTIFIED COPY)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOUVET, LILIANA AS TO DEFENDANT BOGDEN, PAUL
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT TO ALL PARTIES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2013 - JUDGMENT.
